## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No new **runtime** dependencies (the package ships zero deps)
- [ ] Privacy-first: no network unless the user opts in (geolocation / weather)
- [ ] Public API changes are documented (README/CHANGELOG) and versioned (semver)
- [ ] Stayed in scope: TheSwitch is **theming only** (translation → Mr.Latin)
